prompt: Create a 5-question fill-in-the-blank drill teaching when to use 'morar' vs 'viver' in Brazilian Portuguese, A1 level. Use the JSON format that matches the other drills in config/prompts/. Save the JSON to outputs/drill.json.

assertions.text: Output is valid JSON with id, name, description, variant, systemPrompt fields
variant field is set to BP or bp (not EP)
Drill restricts to BP only (no tu, no enclisis, no EP forms in the system prompt or examples)
Fixed 5-question opener uses singular subjects only (eu, voce, ele/ela) — no plural forms (nos, eles, vocês conjugations) per A1 atomic-focus principle
morar examples target residence contexts (city, address, where you live)
viver examples target being-alive or quality-of-life contexts (not residence)
All Portuguese example sentences include English translations or glosses
No fake accents on Portuguese words (no spurious accents like *moro vs móro, no ele vs êle)
Includes vocabulary scaffolding (defines connector words like em, onde, com before use)
